languages.text: "Установленный нейроимплант еще не до конца синхронизировался с моей памятью. Вынужден отказаться от разговоров о личном, чтобы не вводить вас в заблуждение".
"The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."
languages.original_text: "Установленный нейроимплант еще не до конца синхронизировался с моей памятью. Вынужден отказаться от разговоров о личном, чтобы не вводить вас в заблуждение".

traits.locale_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."
"The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."
"The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."

languages.text: "Das Neuralimplantat, das mir installiert wurde, ist noch nicht vollständig mit meinen Erinnerungen synchronisiert. Ich darf also nicht über persönliche Dinge sprechen, um Euch nicht irrezuführen."
languages.original_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."

traits.locale_text: "Das Neuralimplantat, das mir installiert wurde, ist noch nicht vollständig mit meinen Erinnerungen synchronisiert. Ich darf also nicht über persönliche Dinge sprechen, um Euch nicht irrezuführen."

languages.text: « L'implant neuronal que j'ai fait installer ne s'est pas encore totalement synchronisé avec ma mémoire. Je me dois d'éviter les sujets personnels de crainte de vous induire en erreur. »
languages.original_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."

traits.locale_text: « L'implant neuronal que j'ai fait installer ne s'est pas encore totalement synchronisé avec ma mémoire. Je me dois d'éviter les sujets personnels de crainte de vous induire en erreur. »

languages.text: “我安装的神经植入物尚未与我的记忆完全同步。我必须停止谈论私人问题，以免误导您。”
languages.original_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."

traits.locale_text: “我安装的神经植入物尚未与我的记忆完全同步。我必须停止谈论私人问题，以免误导您。”

languages.text: «El implante neuronal que me instalaron no ha terminado de sincronizarse con mi memoria. Debo abstenerme de hablar de asuntos personales para evitar engañarle».
languages.original_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."

traits.locale_text: «El implante neuronal que me instalaron no ha terminado de sincronizarse con mi memoria. Debo abstenerme de hablar de asuntos personales para evitar engañarle».

languages.text: "私が取り付けた神経インプラントは、まだ私の記憶と完全に同期していない。誤解を招かないよう、個人的なことを話すのはやめなければならない"
languages.original_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I have to stop talking about personal matters so as not to mislead you."

languages.text: "Taktırdığım nöral implant henüz hafızamla tam olarak senkronize olmadı. Sizi yanıltmamak için kişisel meseleler hakkında konuşmayı bırakmalıyım."
languages.original_text: "The neural implant I had installed has not yet fully synchronised with my memory. I must cease to speak on personal matters so as not to mislead you."

traits.locale_text: "Taktırdığım nöral implant henüz hafızamla tam olarak senkronize olmadı. Sizi yanıltmamak için kişisel meseleler hakkında konuşmayı bırakmalıyım."
